since_last: 74% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.76%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.59% · BTC +0.13% · Gold +1.38% · Nasdaq100 +1.10%. 74% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.76%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.76%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.81%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.81%, VRT +7.30%, ANET +7.20%, AMD +6.99%, INOD +6.82%. Laggards: AVAV -6.27%, UPST -2.68%, OKLO -2.48%, SPCX -2.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.38% at $158.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
